sections.paragraph:
Ἤρ, ὁ indecl. (עֵר) Er (Gen 38:3; TestJud 8:3; 10:1, 3; Philo, Poster. Cai. 180), in the genealogy of Jesus Lk 3:28.

indecl. indecl. = indeclinable

TestJud TestJud = Testament of Judah, s. Test12Patr—List 2

Philo Philo = P. of Alexandria, I b.c.–I a.d.—List 5

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 439
